song.title: The Lord In My Spirit
song.lyrics: [V1] . G C D Em The Lord in my spirit . C G D/F# Em In love takes me higher . D C D C He takes me to soar through . D Dsus D7 The heavens with Him . C D Em And though all is glorious . C G D/F# Em He earthward would bring me . D C D C To share in His labor, . D G C G His burden to bear
